## Wealth manager sells 2,722 shares of Taiwan Semiconductor

No actionable content; immaterial position change in a large-cap name with no implication for TSM's foundry business or AI semiconductor supply thesis.

- Geneos Wealth Management sold 2,722 TSM shares — a small, routine institutional transaction.
- No business, competitive, or strategic signal; straightforward portfolio-management action.
